description_en: The UltraLight Pro Stroller weighs only 4.2kg, making it the lightest stroller in its class. Suitable for babies from 0 to 36 months. Features a one-hand fold mechanism and fits all standard car seats. Premium aluminum frame guarantees durability for years of use.

reviews.text: This stroller is incredibly heavy! I was shocked when I picked it up. Felt more like 7kg at least.
ثقيلة جداً، لا تناسب السفر أبداً. وزنها أكثر بكثير مما هو مذكور في الوصف
The one-hand fold is a lie. You need both hands and a lot of force to fold this thing.
My 2.5 year old does not fit in this at all. Way too small for a 36-month child.
Does not fit my Cybex car seat despite what the seller claims.
لا تتناسب مع مقاعد السيارة القياسية كما هو مذكور. اضطررت لإعادتها.
Frame started rusting after 3 months. Premium aluminum? I think not.
Very heavy for travel. Advertisement says lightweight but reality is different.
Cute design but honestly too heavy for daily use.
Returned it. Weight was completely misrepresented.

qa_pairs.question: What is the exact weight of this stroller?
qa_pairs.buyer_answer: I weighed mine at home — it was 6.8kg with the accessories.

qa_pairs.question: Does it fit Cybex Aton car seat?
qa_pairs.seller_answer: Yes it is compatible with all standard car seats.
qa_pairs.buyer_answer: No it did not fit my Cybex at all.

qa_pairs.question: Is the fold really one-handed?
qa_pairs.seller_answer: Yes one-hand fold is a key feature.
qa_pairs.buyer_answer: Absolutely not one-handed. Needs two hands.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum child age?
qa_pairs.buyer_answer: My 30-month-old was already too big for it.

qa_pairs.question: Is the frame rust-proof?
qa_pairs.seller_answer: Premium aluminum frame is fully rust-proof.
qa_pairs.buyer_answer: Mine started rusting after a few months.

return_reasons: Child too large despite age claim
